name: agent-ready
description: Scan any URL for AI agent-readability (Vercel Agent Readability Spec, llms.txt, agent-protocol manifests) via the Agent Ready scanner.

settings.name: Agent Ready API key
settings.description: Pro API key (ar_live_...) from https://agent-ready.dev/dashboard/api-keys. Required for scan/get/list; the ask tool is public.

settings.name: Agent Ready API URL
settings.description: Override the API base URL (defaults to https://agent-ready.dev).
